mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sale (product_id, quantity, total_price) VALUES (#{productId}, #{quantity}, #{totalPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT id, product_id, quantity, total_price, sold_at FROM sale ORDER BY sold_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, product_id, quantity, total_price, sold_at FROM sale ORDER BY sold_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sale WHERE product_id = #{productId}
